executives.name: Rudi Fronk
executives.background: Mr. Fronk is a co-founder of Seabridge and has over 35 years of experience in the gold business, primarily as a senior executive in corporate development, bankable feasibility studies, and finance. Prior to Seabridge, he held senior positions with Greenstone Resources, Kirkwood Resources, and Amax Gold.

executives.name: Ryan Fowler
executives.background: Mr. Fowler joined Seabridge in 2022 and was appointed Senior Vice President, Operations in 2023. He has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Newcrest Mining and Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Chris Reynolds
executives.background: Mr. Reynolds has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He joined Seabridge in 2007 and has served as Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer since that time.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: William Threlkeld
executives.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in mineral exploration. He has been with Seabridge since 2000 and is responsible for the design and execution of the company's exploration programs.

executives.name: Bruce Scott
executives.background: Mr. Scott is a lawyer with over 30 years of experience in corporate and securities law. He has served as General Counsel for Seabridge since 2011.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Rudi Fronk
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder of Seabridge Gold. Over 35 years of experience in the gold business.

board_of_directors.name: Tracey Meintjes
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Meintjes has over 30 years of experience in mining project development. He is currently a consultant and was previously with Teck Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Jay Layman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Layman was formerly the President and COO of Seabridge Gold. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Eliseo Gonzalez-Urien
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gonzalez-Urien is a geologist with over 50 years of experience. He was formerly the President of Placer Dome Exploration.

board_of_directors.name: Melanie Miller
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Miller has over 25 years of experience in the mining and financial sectors. She is currently an independent consultant.

board_of_directors.name: Clem Pelletier
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pelletier is a process metallurgist with over 50 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environmental and permitting issues.

board_of_directors.name: John Sabine
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sabine is a lawyer with over 40 years of experience in mining law and corporate finance.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Sugar
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sugar has over 40 years of experience in investment banking, specializing in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Carol Willson
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Willson is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 35 years of experience in audit and risk management.
